Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Durward Kirby get into the ring for the boxing movie spoof, "Goldman's Boy."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond

Image.alt: Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond
Steve Lawrence, Durward Kirby, Julie Bond

Video.summary: Guests John Davidson and Ross Martin appear in "The Helen Feibelbaum Story", a spoof of celebrity biopics.
Video.title: Ross Martin, John Davidson

Video.summary: Betty White plays Eunice's sister as "The Family" celebrates Mama's birthday.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Paul Sand guests! Sketches dealing with weddings are featured. Also: bits related to the energy crisis.
Video.title: Paul Sand

Video.summary: Joel Grey & Cass Elliot guests! Features a salute to Foreign Language films, and a sketch with puppies.
Video.title: Joel Grey, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Charo guest! Tim plays a man at a unisex salon, a guy trying to stay awake, and a journalist.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Charo

Video.summary: Maggie Smith returns to guest star as the erudite teacher of Eunice and Ed's son Bubba in "The Family."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Rock Hudson spoof "The Murderer Always Rings Twice", and meet a decorator in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Rock Hudson

Video.summary: You get two Carols for the price of one when Carol Channing guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carol Channing

Video.summary: Paul Lynde and Peggy Lee are tonight's guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Peggy Lee

Video.summary: It's time to say "so long" as Carol closes the book on one of the greatest shows in television history.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Diahann Carroll and Carol perform a number. The Smothers Brothers drop by, and "Carol & Sis" try astrology.
Video.title: Diahann Carroll, Smothers Brothers

Video.summary: Barbara McNair and Carol spoof a classic TV series with "I Try".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Sid Casesar

Video.summary: Paul Lynde and Nanette Fabray guest on the season finale, featuring an installment of "As The Stomach Turns".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence, The Captain & Tennille appear in spoofs, while Steve and Carol reveal a secretary's thoughts.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille

Image.alt: Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille

Video.summary: Cass Elliot & Tim Conway star! Cass & Carol browse literature, and Tim is an odd substitute in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters stars in a sketch about a woman introducing friends to each other. Also, an office visit.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell and The Jackson 5 guest star!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Roddy McDowall, Jackson Five

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters & Donald O'Connor star. Includes Carol & Peters' duet. Also "Carol & Sis" & "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Donald O'Connor

Video.summary: Ray Charles is a highlight of this episode, featuring Tim Conway in a sketch where they are billboard hangers.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ray Charles

Video.summary: Guest star Joanne Woodward spends an evening with "The Family" in this episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joanne Woodward

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway is featured in two sketches, pairing him with Harvey and Carol, respectively.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Carol is a dowdy secretary discouraging applicants, and the movie spoof "Flight 13 To Nowhere."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Vicki plays an author whose changes to her story are acted out, and Tim demonstrates the latest in safety.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Bing Crosby and Rowan Martin guest! Bing's sketch is set in Brown Derby, while the "Laugh-In" boys are crooks.
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Rowan & Martin

Video.summary: Imogene Coca and Mel Torme guest. Coca and Carol are wives of rivals, and Torme is Igor in a Dracula sketch.
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Guests Steve Lawrence and Bernadette Peters each team up with Carol in another delightful night of comedy.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Features commercial spoofs, Harvey trying to give a speech, and Carol demonstrating how nobody notices her.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Lucille Ball joins Carol for "The Rock Sisters!" George Carlin is on hand with words that you CAN say.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: Mickey Rooney and John Davidson guest. Davidson sings, Rooney stars in a Western, and Carol must choose.
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars with Carol as Western movie stars in "The Saga Of Lily And Billy." Dick Cavett crashes Q&A .
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Tim Conway guest, with Martha in a sketch about mothers, and Tim as "The Virgin Prince."
Video.title: Martha Raye, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Rock Hudson and Nancy Walker join for sketch set in the days of vaudeville, "When My Baby Laughs At Me."
Video.title: Rock Hudson, Nancy Walker

Video.summary: Lucille Ball and Tim Conway guest star, highlighted by a sketch in which Lucy and Carol are Rent-A-Car agents.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway & the cast head to Sydney, Australia! Tim leads the Sydney Orchestra, & Harvey deals with co-star.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Mr. Steve Lawrence joins Carol in a sketch about a traveling couple sharing some honesty with each other.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Andy Griffith guests, retelling a familiar Aesop tale, then joining Carol for a musical number: "Cinderellie."
Video.title: Andy Griffith

Video.summary: Jack Cassidy & Tim Conway star! Tim plays an orphan, then joins Jack and Carol for "The Story Of A Star."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Jack Cassidy
